# Sprint 7.2 Strategic Value

**Project:** urban-parking-optimization-system
**Sprint:** Sprint 7. Final Outcomes

Assess the strategic value of the system, including its impact on economic efficiency, environmental stewardship, and urban livability.

## Deliverable
